location_precision.why: Every finding carries a usable file:line (e.g. 'src/sync.py:14', 'src/report.py:11').

interaction_synthesis.why: The report.py:11 finding mechanistically ties two components together — 'IndexError for emails lacking "@", such as the empty strings sync_users writes' — showing sync's bad output crashing the report parser.

causal_clarity.why: Every finding states the failure mechanism, e.g. floor division 'skips the final partial page, so up to 99 trailing users are silently dropped' and mutable default 'persists across calls, so any user id... is silently skipped forever.'
